tool.name: deserialization_scanner
tool.description: Scan for deserialization vulnerabilities in web applications.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Detect potential deserialization endpoints - Generate Java deserialization payload info (ysoserial) - Generate PHP object injection payload info (phpggc) - Generate Python pickle deserialization payloads - Analyze serialized data to identify format

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The scanning action: - detect: Detect deserialization endpoints - generate_java: Generate Java deserialization info - generate_php: Generate PHP object injection info - generate_python: Generate Python pickle info - analyze: Analyze serialized data format

parameter.name: url
parameter.description: Target URL for detection. Required for detect.

parameter.name: data
parameter.description: Serialized data string to analyze. Required for analyze.

parameter.name: gadget
parameter.description: Java gadget chain: all, CommonsCollections1, etc. (default: all)

returns.description: Deserialization scan results with vulnerability indicators and payload info
